creator: val@packett.cool
text:
(In reply to Oleksandr Tymoshenko from comment #19)
I've been working on FreeBSD support in u2f-hid-rs, the Rust library that's used in Firefox: https://github.com/myfreeweb/u2f-hid-rs/commit/85d86018ddbd3e6eb213f98397b93e0b04f62e55

Using devd for hotplug, and enumerating existing devices is essentially `ls /dev | grep uhid` :D

There's no need to get VID/PID to check whether it's a U2F device! That would actually make new devices unsupported by default.

That library just reads the HID report descriptor and checks for the FIDO usage: https://github.com/jcjones/u2f-hid-rs/blob/368c327ec787e02d93468e5f2574ebec30388cee/src/linux/hidraw.rs#L183-L219
